svg.style: background: #ffffff; background-color: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212)); color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram name="Page-1" id="j_ifC99b85ZEHaya3WY-"> <mxGraphModel dx="5640" dy="3947" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="827" pageHeight="1169" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <UserObject label="" plantUmlData="{"data":"@startuml Data_Center_Network_Segmentation
skinparam backgroundColor white
skinparam defaultFontName Arial
skinparam defaultFontSize 10
skinparam componentStyle rectangle
skinparam padding 3
skinparam nodesep 60
skinparam ranksep 40

title **Single Data Center - Logical Network Segmentation (NYC or Paris)**\n

' ============================================================
' INTERNET
' ============================================================
cloud \"Internet\" as Internet #LightBlue;line:DarkBlue {
 node \"Users / API Clients\" as Users
}

' ============================================================
' EDGE / PERIMETER
' ============================================================
package \"Edge / Perimeter\" as Edge #FFF0F0;line:DarkRed {
 package \"VLAN 10 - Perimeter Firewall\n10.1.10.0/28\" as V10 #FFDDDD;line:Red {
 [Firewall Primary\n(pfSense/OPNsense)\n10.1.10.1] as FW1
 [Firewall Standby\n(CARP Failover)\n10.1.10.2] as FW2
 [VIP: 10.1.10.3] as FW_VIP
 }
 package \"VLAN 20 - IDS/IPS\n10.1.20.0/28\" as V20 #FFDDDD;line:Red {
 [Suricata IPS\n(Inline Mode)\n10.1.20.1] as IPS
 }
}

' ============================================================
' DMZ ZONE
' ============================================================
package \"DMZ Zone\" as DMZ #FFEECC;line:OrangeRed {
 package \"VLAN 30 - Reverse Proxy / Load Balancer\n10.1.30.0/28\" as V30 #FFE0B2;line:OrangeRed {
 [HAProxy Primary\n(SSL Termination)\n10.1.30.1] as HAP1
 [HAProxy Standby\n(Keepalived VIP)\n10.1.30.2] as HAP2
 [VIP: 10.1.30.3] as HAP_VIP
 }
 package \"VLAN 40 - WAF\n10.1.40.0/28\" as V40 #FFE0B2;line:OrangeRed {
 [ModSecurity\n+ OWASP CRS\n10.1.40.1] as WAF
 }
}

' ============================================================
' INTERNAL ZONE
' ============================================================
package \"Internal Zone\" as Internal #CCFFCC;line:Green {
 package \"VLAN 50 - Web/App Servers (Active/Passive Cluster)\n10.1.50.0/24\" as V50 #C8E6C9;line:Green {
 [App Server ACTIVE\n(Nginx + API)\n10.1.50.10] as APP1
 [App Server PASSIVE\n(Standby)\n10.1.50.11] as APP2
 [Pacemaker/Corosync\nVIP: 10.1.50.100] as CLUSTER_VIP
 note bottom of CLUSTER_VIP
 **Active/Passive HA Cluster**
 Pacemaker monitors services
 Corosync handles heartbeat
 STONITH via IPMI fencing
 Auto-failover < 30s
 end note
 }
 package \"VLAN 60 - Database Servers\n10.1.60.0/28\" as V60 #C8E6C9;line:Green {
 [PostgreSQL Primary\n10.1.60.1] as DB1
 [PostgreSQL Hot Standby\n(Streaming Replication)\n10.1.60.2] as DB2
 [Patroni + etcd\nAutomatic Failover\nVIP: 10.1.60.10] as DB_VIP
 }
}

' ============================================================
' STORAGE ZONE
' ============================================================
package \"Storage Zone (iSCSI SAN)\" as Storage #E0CCFF;line:Purple {
 package \"VLAN 70 - iSCSI Data Network\n10.1.70.0/24\" as V70 #D1C4E9;line:Purple {
 [Storage Server 1\n(iSCSI Target + LIO)\n10.1.70.1\nRAID 6 - 12x 4TB] as SAN1
 [Storage Server 2\n(iSCSI Target + LIO)\n10.1.70.2\nRAID 6 - 12x 4TB] as SAN2
 [Storage Server 3\n(iSCSI Target + LIO)\n10.1.70.3\nRAID 6 - 12x 4TB] as SAN3
 note bottom of SAN1
 **SAN High Availability**
 Heartbeat between nodes
 Multipath I/O (dm-multipath)
 Hot-swappable disks (RAID 6)
 SMART monitoring + alerts
 30GB LUN per user on least-used server
 end note
 }
 package \"VLAN 80 - Storage Replication\n10.1.80.0/28\" as V80 #D1C4E9;line:Purple {
 [DRBD Async Replication\nto Remote DC\n10.1.80.1] as DRBD
 }
 package \"VLAN 85 - Backup Network\n10.1.85.0/28\" as V85 #D1C4E9;line:Purple {
 [Backup Agent\n(BorgBackup)\n10.1.85.1] as BKAGENT
 note bottom of BKAGENT
 Daily incremental to Toronto
 Weekly full backup
 Encrypted in transit (VPN)
 GFS tape rotation scheme
 end note
 }
}

' ============================================================
' MANAGEMENT ZONE
' ============================================================
package \"Management Zone\" as Mgmt #FFFFCC;line:GoldenRod {
 package \"VLAN 90 - SIEM & Logging\n10.1.90.0/28\" as V90 #FFF9C4;line:GoldenRod {
 [Wazuh Manager\n+ Elasticsearch\n10.1.90.1] as SIEM
 [Graylog / ELK\nLog Aggregation\n10.1.90.2] as LOGS
 }
 package \"VLAN 100 - Monitoring\n10.1.100.0/28\" as V100 #FFF9C4;line:GoldenRod {
 [Zabbix Server\n10.1.100.1] as ZABBIX
 [Grafana Dashboard\n10.1.100.2] as GRAFANA
 }
 package \"VLAN 110 - Bastion / Jump Host\n10.1.110.0/28\" as V110 #FFF9C4;line:GoldenRod {
 [Bastion Host\n(SSH Key Auth Only)\n10.1.110.1] as BASTION
 note bottom of BASTION
 Only entry point for admins
 2FA enforced (TOTP)
 Session recording (asciinema)
 All SSH keys rotated quarterly
 end note
 }
 package \"VLAN 120 - Out-of-Band Mgmt\n10.1.120.0/28\" as V120 #FFF9C4;line:GoldenRod {
 [IPMI / iLO / iDRAC\nHardware Management\n10.1.120.0/28] as OOB
 note bottom of OOB
 Used for STONITH fencing
 Isolated from production traffic
 Firmware updates & KVM access
 end note
 }
}

' ============================================================
' INTER-DC VPN ENDPOINT
' ============================================================
package \"Inter-DC Connectivity\" as InterDC #E3F2FD;line:DarkBlue {
 [IPsec/WireGuard\nVPN Gateway\n10.1.200.1] as VPN
 note bottom of VPN
 **Encrypted Tunnels**
 NYC <-> Paris: IPsec IKEv2
 NYC <-> Toronto: IPsec IKEv2
 Paris <-> Toronto: IPsec IKEv2
 AES-256-GCM encryption
 PFS with DH Group 21
 end note
}

' ============================================================
' TRAFFIC FLOWS
' ============================================================

' --- Inbound user traffic ---
Internet ==[#DarkBlue,bold]==> FW_VIP : **HTTPS (443)**
FW_VIP ==[#DarkRed]==> IPS : Inspected Traffic
IPS ==[#OrangeRed]==> WAF : Filtered Traffic
WAF ==[#OrangeRed]==> HAP_VIP : Clean Traffic
HAP_VIP ==[#Green]==> CLUSTER_VIP : Load Balanced\nto Active App

' --- App to DB ---
APP1 ==[#Green]==> DB_VIP : SQL Queries\n(Port 5432)
APP2 .[#Gray].> DB_VIP : (on failover)

' --- App to Storage ---
APP1 ==[#Purple]==> V70 : iSCSI (Port 3260)\nMultipath
APP2 .[#Gray].> V70 : (on failover)

' --- DB Replication ---
DB1 .[#DarkGreen].> DB2 : Streaming\nReplication

' --- Storage Replication to other DC ---
V70 ==[#Purple]==> DRBD : Block-level sync
DRBD ==[#DarkBlue]==> VPN : Encrypted to\nRemote DC

' --- Backup flow ---
V70 -[#Purple]-> BKAGENT : Backup data
DB1 -[#Green]-> BKAGENT : DB dumps (pg_dump)
BKAGENT ==[#DarkBlue]==> VPN : Encrypted to\nToronto DC

' --- Management access (dashed) ---
BASTION .[#GoldenRod].> Edge : Admin SSH
BASTION .[#GoldenRod].> DMZ : Admin SSH
BASTION .[#GoldenRod].> Internal : Admin SSH
BASTION .[#GoldenRod].> Storage : Admin SSH

' --- Monitoring flows (dashed) ---
Edge .[#Gray].> SIEM : Firewall Logs
DMZ .[#Gray].> SIEM : Access Logs
Internal .[#Gray].> SIEM : App + DB Logs
Storage .[#Gray].> SIEM : Storage Logs + SMART
Edge .[#Gray].> ZABBIX : Metrics
DMZ .[#Gray].> ZABBIX : Metrics
Internal .[#Gray].> ZABBIX : Metrics
Storage .[#Gray].> ZABBIX : Metrics

' --- IPMI for fencing ---
OOB .[#Red].> APP1 : STONITH
OOB .[#Red].> APP2 : STONITH

' ============================================================
' LEGEND
' ============================================================
legend right
 **Legend**
 |= Color |= Meaning |
 | <color:DarkBlue>**Blue**</color> | Internet / Encrypted inter-DC traffic |
 | <color:DarkRed>**Dark Red**</color> | Perimeter security (FW + IPS) |
 | <color:OrangeRed>**Orange**</color> | DMZ traffic (WAF + LB) |
 | <color:Green>**Green**</color> | Internal app + DB traffic |
 | <color:Purple>**Purple**</color> | Storage / SAN / Replication |
 | <color:GoldenRod>**Gold dashed**</color> | Admin access (via Bastion only) |
 | <color:Gray>**Gray dashed**</color> | Logs & monitoring |
 | <color:Red>**Red dashed**</color> | STONITH / Fencing |

 **Denied Traffic (Firewall Enforced)**
 Internet → Internal / Storage / Mgmt: BLOCKED
 DMZ → Storage / Mgmt (direct): BLOCKED
 Internal → DMZ (reverse): BLOCKED
 Storage → Internal / DMZ (reverse): BLOCKED
 Any zone → Internet (except DMZ): BLOCKED
 Cross-zone without explicit rule: BLOCKED

 **Key Design Decisions**
 Active/Passive cluster: Pacemaker + Corosync
 SAN: iSCSI with LIO + Heartbeat + RAID 6
 DB: PostgreSQL + Patroni (auto-failover)
 Encryption: IPsec IKEv2 AES-256-GCM
 IPS: Suricata inline | WAF: ModSecurity
 SIEM: Wazuh | Monitoring: Zabbix + Grafana
 Backup: BorgBackup → Toronto (GFS rotation)
endlegend

@enduml","format":"svg"}" id="OOhNXtDeH7EwTNOJhwU0-1"> <mxCell parent="1" style="shape=image;noLabel=1;verticalAlign=top;aspect=fixed;imageAspect=0;image=data:image/svg+xml,;" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="2764" width="2972" x="20" y="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </UserObject> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

svg.style: width: 2972px; height: 2764px; background: rgb(255, 255, 255); font-family: initial;
svg.title: **Single Data Center - Logical Network Segmentation (NYC or Paris)**

g.text: Single Data Center - Logical Network Segmentation (NYC or Paris)
30GB LUN per user on least-used server
SAN: iSCSI with LIO + Heartbeat + RAID 6
